itemName.en: AR-15 Strike Industries Advanced Receiver Extension buffer tube (Anodized Red)

itemName.zh: 奈特军械公司 (KAC) SR-25 7.62x51 精确射手步枪 ★
itemName.en: Knight's Armament Company SR-25 7.62x51 marksman rifle

itemName.zh: HK G28 7.62x51 精确射手步枪 ☆
雷明顿 R11 RSASS 7.62x51 精确射手步枪 ☆

description.zh:
这次订单很大，一下子三把枪，全是 7.62x51 精确射手步枪。如果你愿意帮忙，我可以让你获得我们库存中最顶级的几款枪支。

我就不废话太多了，Remington 的那把需要配 SureFire 激光手电、红点瞄具，弹匣容量要达到 50 发以上。德国造的 G28 要配 Schmidt & Bender 1-8x 光学瞄具、DeltaPoint 红点和一个战术装置。至于 SR-25，需要装 Leupold 高倍镜、两脚架和消音器，枪身不能太大。你能搞定吗？

RSASS 要求：
 - 后坐力总和小于 280
 - 重量小于 5.3 公斤
 - 人机功效 55 或更高
 - 耐久度至少 95 %
 - 弹匣容量 50 或更多
 - “射击场”距离 400米 或更多
 - X400战术手电

G28 要求：
 - 后坐力总和小于 345
 - 重量小于 4.0 公斤
 - 人机功效 50 或更高
 - 耐久度至少 95 %
 - 弹匣容量 10 或更多
 - 任意 战术设备
 - Leupold DeltaPoint反射式瞄具
 - Schmidt & Bender PM II 1-8x24瞄准镜

SR-25 要求：
 - 后坐力总和小于 225
 - 重量小于 6.6 公斤
 - 人机功效 32 或更高
 - 耐久度至少 95 %
 - 弹匣容量 20 或更多
 - 高度占用 2格 或更少
 - 任意 脚架
 - 任意 消音器
 - Leupold Mark 4 LR 6.5-20x50步枪瞄准镜
description.en:
We got a huge order this time, three rifles at the same time, 7.62x51 marksman rifles. If you're interested in helping again I can get you access to the finest rifles we have in stock.

I won't get too much into detail here, the remington rifle needs a surefire flashlight with laser, a reflex sight and should hold at least fifty rounds. The german rifle should have a Schmidt & Bender 1-8x scope combined with a deltapoint reflex sight and a tactical device. And the SR-25 requires a Leupold scope, bipod and suppressor, it shouldn't be too big either. Can you handle that?

RSASS Requirements :
 - Recoil Sum less than 280
 - Weight less than 5.3 KG
 - Ergonomics 55 or higher
 - Durability higher than 95 %
 - Magazine Capacity of 50 or more
 - Sighting Range of 400 Meters or more
 - SureFire X400 Ultra Tactical Flashlight with Laser

G28 Requirements :
 - Recoil Sum less than 345
 - Weight less than 4.0 KG
 - Ergonomics 50 or higher
 - Durability higher than 95 %
 - Magazine Capacity of 10 or more
 - A Tactical Device
 - Leupold DeltaPoint Reflex Sight
 - Schmidt & Bender PM II 1-8x24 30mm Riflescope

SR-25 Requirements :
 - Recoil Sum less than 225
 - Weight less than 6.6 KG
 - Ergonomics 32 or higher
 - Durability higher than 95 %
 - Magazine Capacity of 20 or more
 - Height of 2 slots or less
 - A Bipod
 - A Silencer
 - Leupold Mark 4 LR 6.5-20x50 30mm Riflescope
